note: ELEANOR-DAVID governance variant -- the 70B ELEANOR gate that governs DAVID's Llama 3.1 8B language product. ELEANOR is always 70B regardless of the product model it gates. Inherits base ELEANOR architecture from AI/ELEANOR; adds DAVID-specific governance (media/language compliance, synthetic-actor rails, pronunciation accuracy, video-script governance). Variant corpus shards only -- do NOT copy the base ELEANOR corpus here.

dataset.corpus_shards_note: Variant-specific shards (eleanor_david_T1..T6_*.jsonl), generated by research/generate_eleanor_david_corpus.py and merged by eleanor_dataset_builder.py (glob eleanor_david_T*_*.jsonl). 2026-06-26 seed: 6 shards x 20 = 120 pairs (T1 educational compliance, T2 synthetic-media compliance, T3 vision governance, T4 language accuracy, T5 intrinsic-subagent routing, T6 cross-product value). Base ELEANOR corpus is NOT bundled here by design. 2026-06-26 research-mined expansion: T7 dead-language governance, T8 dialect/forensic-value, T9 living-language compliance, T10 video-script (Grok Imagine) governance = 4 shards x 25 = 100 new pairs (total 220), grounded in DAVID INTERPRETATION_GATE + confidence-tier + synthetic-actor research.

model.hf_note: Requires HUGGING_FACE_HUB_TOKEN and Meta Llama 3.3 approval at huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct

dry_run.note: 220 pairs in corpus (T1-T10, DAVID-domain only, no LE content). Scale to target_pairs 1000 before live run. H100 80GB minimum for 70B 4-bit.
